diagrams.title: IoT Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Five-layer architecture showing data flow from physical sensors to business analytics
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how data flows and gets transformed through IoT system components

diagrams.title: IoT System Design Methodology Flowchart

diagrams.purpose: Understand the systematic approach to IoT system development

diagrams.title: Edge-Fog-Cloud Computing Spectrum
diagrams.description: Distribution of processing across IoT computing infrastructure
elements: Data volume decreases upward, processing capability increases upward
diagrams.purpose: Understand where to perform computation based on latency and processing requirements
